title: agrostis perennans
intro: Agrostis perennans, also known as bluebunch wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis perennans include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting digestive well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including dried leaves and roots.
